creator: oleglelchuk@gmail.com
text: I also want to mention that I always had PARALLEL_JOBS=1 setting in poudriere.conf. As I said earlier, I find it puzzling that my computer kept crashing after I commented out ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS setting. Was I wrong in my belief that when this setting is disabled, poudriere can only make use of one job? As mentioned earlier, re-enabling ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS and setting MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER to 2 in make.conf allowed me to avoid crashing the computer and build the port successfully.
